chain.thought: Explanation: From 2009 to 2013, the viewers were 6.487 million (2009), 5.709 million (2010), 6.337 million (2011), 5.1 million (2012), and 5.5 million (2013). Adding these together: 6.487 + 5.709 + 6.337 + 5.1 + 5.5 = 29.133 million viewers.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The viewers from 2009 to 2013 are:
2009: 6.487 million
2010: 5.709 million
2011: 6.337 million
2012: 5.1 million
2013: 5.5 million
Summing these: 6.487 + 5.709 + 6.337 + 5.1 + 5.5 = 29.133 million. The Prediction Answer matches this total.
